file.fileData:
<#-- title: Home -->
v2.0 Open Source Released

Feeling overwhelmed by your ERP?
You're not alone.

The open-source, AI-powered ERP that scales with you. Eliminate data silos, automate workflows, and gain intelligent insights across your entire organization with unparalleled clarity.

Start Free Trial calendar_month Ask for a Demo

No credit card required • 2 weeks free

Intelligence Engineered for Scale

Built on modern architecture to provide unprecedented visibility and control over every facet of your enterprise.

sync

All-in-One

Your whole business in sync. Connect sales, operations, and finance in a single unified workflow ecosystem.

psychology

AI-Powered

Intelligent insights at your fingertips. Predictive analytics and automated reporting out-of-the-box.

code

Open Source

Full control and transparency. Inspect the code, customize modules, and truly own your infrastructure.

cloud_done

Run Anywhere

Cloud or on-premise flexibility. Deploy on our secure managed cloud or your own private servers instantly.

Get GrowERP on every platform

One codebase, every device — your data syncs seamlessly.

languageWeb Browser androidAndroid phone_iphoneiOS & macOS terminalLinux grid_viewWindows

<#-- title: Verticals -->

Tailored Verticals

Specialized applications designed for specific industries. Choose the one that perfectly fits your business model.

admin_panel_settings

Admin

The core comprehensive ERP for medium to large enterprises. Full control over all modules, accounting, and organization settings.

admin.growerp.com arrow_forward
language android phone_iphone terminal grid_view
hotel

Hotel

Designed for hotels, bed & breakfasts, and resorts. Manage reservations, room inventory, and guest experiences seamlessly.

hotel.growerp.com arrow_forward
language android phone_iphone terminal grid_view
car_rental

Rental

Perfect for equipment, vehicle, or property rental businesses. Track asset availability, maintenance, and recurring billing.

rental.growerp.com arrow_forward
person

Freelance

Tailored for independent professionals and solopreneurs. Simplified invoicing, task tracking, and client management.

freelance.growerp.com arrow_forward
campaign

Marketing

Built for any company to improve marketing and sales: create campaigns, conduct outreach, nurture leads, and automate content marketing.

marketing.growerp.com arrow_forward
support_agent

Agents

Empower your AI agents and customer support teams. Manage knowledge bases, automate responses, and oversee agent actions.

agents.growerp.com arrow_forward

How about your vertical?

Tell us what you need — we can deliver your app within one week.

Book a call arrow_forward

# Getting Started
Get up and running with GrowERP in minutes. No credit card required.
---
## Quick Setup (5 Minutes)
### Step 1: Choose Your App Visit [admin.growerp.com](https://admin.growerp.com) or download the app from your platform's store (see links on the home page).
### Step 2: Register Click **"Register"** at the bottom of the login screen. Enter your email address and choose a password.
### Step 3: Check Your Email The system will send you login credentials. Use them to sign in for the first time.
### Step 4: Configure Your Company You'll be prompted for your company name and preferred currency. Want to explore first? Select the option to **generate demo data** — it populates the system with sample products, orders, and customers so you can see everything in action.
### Step 5: Explore You'll land on the main dashboard. From here you can: - Browse the product catalog - Create a test order - View your auto-generated business website - Try the AI Agent Control Center - Explore accounting, inventory, and CRM modules
---
## For Developers
Want to run GrowERP locally or contribute to the project?
### Prerequisites - OpenJDK 21 - Flutter stable - Git
### Local Installation ``` git clone https://github.com/growerp/growerp cd growerp git submodule update --init --recursive ./setup-backend.sh ```
See the full [Developer Documentation](https://github.com/growerp/growerp/blob/master/docs/README.md) for detailed guides on building blocks, backend components, and AI integrations.
---
## Need Help?
- **Email Support:** support@growerp.com - **GitHub Issues:** [Report bugs or request features](https://github.com/growerp/growerp/issues) - **GitHub Discussions:** [Ask questions and share ideas](https://github.com/growerp/growerp/discussions) - **Documentation:** [41+ guides covering all aspects](https://github.com/growerp/growerp/blob/master/docs/README.md)
---
## Deleting Your Data
If you decide GrowERP isn't for you: 1. Log in as the administrator 2. Navigate to your **Personal Screen** (found under "Company" in the employee section) 3. Click the **Delete** button
> **Warning:** If you are the sole administrator, this permanently deletes the company data. This action is irreversible.

<#-- title: Benefits -->
Enterprise Intelligence

Why Choose GrowERP?

The intelligence and flexibility your enterprise needs to scale without limits.

apps

Full ERP Scope: One System, Every Module

Accounting, CRM, inventory, e-commerce, HR, manufacturing and POS in a single connected suite. No stitching together point solutions.

  • check_circle Accounting, CRM & Sales
  • check_circle Inventory, Manufacturing & POS
code

Free & Open Source

No license fees, full source access. Inspect the code, modify the logic, and host wherever you choose. Zero vendor lock-in.

CC-BY-4.0 License Security Audited
cloud_done

Mature, Battle-Tested Backend

Built on Moqui, a proven enterprise framework, exposed entirely through REST APIs for reliable, predictable integration.

api
storage
shield
domain

Multi-Company & Multi-Tenant

Run many separate businesses from a single install, each with its own data, users and configuration.

devices

Runs Everywhere: True Multi-Platform

One Flutter codebase, every device. Android, iOS, Web, Linux and Windows, all built and maintained together.

  • check_circle Native Mobile Apps (iOS & Android)
  • check_circle Web & Desktop (Linux & Windows)
phone_iphone laptop_mac desktop_windows
widgets

Modular Building Blocks

Reusable growerp_* packages compose custom apps fast, no rebuilding from scratch for every new use case.

growerp_* Packages Compose Fast
extension

Extensible Without Forking

Add custom apps and screens on top of the core, no need to fork or rewrite the underlying system.

dashboard_customize
integration_instructions
hub
bolt

Fast, Low-Cost Deployment

Get a small business running quickly, at a fraction of the cost and time of SAP or Oracle implementations.

See the Getting Started Guide arrow_forward

Typical Go-Live

Days, Not Months

Low-Cost
smart_toy

AI Agent Control Center

Configure and supervise autonomous AI agents from one dashboard, agents that monitor, act, and report across every module.

  • check_circle Autonomous Task Execution
  • check_circle Human-Supervised Oversight
smart_toy monitoring chat

Ready to redefine your operations?

Join the global businesses leveraging the power of GrowERP's intelligent ecosystem.

Start Free Trial Request Demo

<#-- title: Pricing -->

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose the plan that best fits your workflow. Start free, upgrade when you're ready.

Do It Yourself (DIY)

$49.99 /mo

For self-starters who want full control over their deployment.

  • check_circle 50 Users Included
  • check_circle Full Platform Access
  • check_circle Community Support
  • check_circle Standard Documentation
Choose DIY
Most Popular

Do It With You (DWY)

$499 /mo

Guided implementation with our expert team alongside you.

  • check_circle Everything in DIY
  • check_circle 20 Manhours Included
  • check_circle Weekly Strategy Calls
  • check_circle Priority Email Support
  • check_circle Guided Data Migration
Choose DWY

Do It For You (DFY)

$999 /mo

Turnkey solution. We handle everything from setup to launch.

  • check_circle Everything in DWY
  • check_circle 40 Manhours Included
  • check_circle Dedicated Account Manager
  • check_circle Custom Integrations
  • check_circle 24/7 Phone Support
Choose DFY

Enterprise

Custom

Tailored architecture for large scale operations and complex requirements.

  • check_circle Unlimited Scalability
  • check_circle On-Premise Deployment Options
  • check_circle Advanced Security Audits
  • check_circle SLA Guarantees
Contact Sales

No credit card required • 2 weeks free on all plans

Checkout

# About Us
GrowERP is brought to you by **AntWebsystems Co., Ltd**, an officially registered software development company in Thailand under European management.
## Our Expertise
With years of experience developing and extending business applications, we have deep expertise in building enterprise-grade ERP and CRM systems. We are currently supporting installations in North America, Europe, and Asia.
Our extensive background as top contributors and committers to major open-source frameworks has shaped our approach: we build highly capable, modular systems designed for scale and flexibility. GrowERP is the culmination of our mission to bring advanced, AI-powered business management to everyone.
## How We Work
We believe in transparency and rapid iteration. We utilize agile software development methodologies (like Scrum) to ensure our partners and customers can see progress on a daily basis.
When you work with us for customization or support, you benefit from: - Clear, time-boxed delivery cycles (1-4 weeks) - Daily visibility into the development process - Flexible requirement changes with minimal impact on implementation - Quality support at competitive rates
## Open Source Philosophy
GrowERP is released under the **CC0 1.0 Universal** (Public Domain) license. This means: - **No licensing fees** — ever - **Full source code access** — customize anything - **No vendor lock-in** — you own your data and your deployment - **Community-driven** — contributions from developers worldwide improve the platform for everyone
## Contact & Support
Whether you need requirements gathering, implementation, custom interfacing, or managed production systems, we are ready to help.
- **Company Website:** [www.antwebsystems.com](https://www.antwebsystems.com) - **Email Support:** support@growerp.com / support@antwebsystems.com - **GitHub:** [github.com/growerp](https://github.com/growerp) - **LinkedIn:** [GrowERP Group](https://www.linkedin.com/groups/4576897/) - **Twitter/X:** [@grow_erp](https://x.com/grow_erp)
**[Let us know how we can help you within 24 hours.](mailto:support@antwebsystems.com)**

# Privacy Policy
**Effective Date:** October 2024
This Privacy Policy explains how The system GrowERP collects, uses, discloses, and safeguards your information when you use our application (App). By using our App, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.
## 1. Information We Collect ### a. Personal Information We may collect personal information that you provide directly to us, such as: Name, Email address, Phone number, Payment information when you use the E-Commerce part. ### b. Usage Data We may collect information automatically when you use our App, including: Device type and model, IP address, Operating system version, App usage information.
## 2. How We Use Your Information - To provide, maintain, and improve the App - To personalize your experience - To process transactions and send related information - To communicate with you about updates, promotions, or news related to the app - To analyze usage trends and monitor app performance
## 3. How We Share Your Information We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties, except as follows: Service Providers and Legal Requirements.
## 4. Data Security We take the security of your data seriously and use safeguards to protect your information.
## 5. Your Rights You have the right to Access, Correction, Deletion, and Opt-out.
## 6. Third-Party Links We are not responsible for the privacy practices or the content of third-party websites or services linked from our App.
## 7. Children's Privacy Our App is not intended for children under the age of 13.
## 8. Changes to This Privacy Policy We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.
## 9. Contact Us If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: support@growerp.com
